ground_truth.title: Agency vs Curology: Which Skincare Service Is Right for You?
ground_truth.author: Jennifer Highland
ground_truth.main_content: Agency vs Curology vs Miiskin: A full comparison. Do you want to know the differences between Agency vs Curology? You have come to the right place, we will not only answer your questions but offer you an additional alternative as well. What is Agency? Agency is a subscription-based online skincare service. Created by the same parent company as Curology, Agency provides custom-compounded topical treatments prescribed by dermatology providers including nurse practitioners and physician assistants. Users complete an online consultation and receive a tailored formula on a subscription basis, making Agency a convenient option for adults seeking skincare without visiting a dermatologist in person. What is Curology? Curology is a subscription-based online service that provides custom skincare. Users submit a questionnaire and photos of their skin, which are reviewed by licensed providers who then prescribe a personalized topical formula. Curology is known for its accessibility and affordability for individuals seeking a consistent skincare routine without needing in-office dermatology visits. What is Miiskin? Miiskin is an online dermatology network that connects patients with independent, board-certified dermatologists across all 50 U.S. states. Unlike subscription-based services, like Curology or Agency, care on the Miiskin platform is on a pay-per-consultation model, allowing users to receive expert advice and treatment plans for a wide range of skin conditions. Independent, board-certified dermatologists can prescribe oral and topical medications (compounded or commercially available), which are filled on-demand through third-party pharmacies. Miiskin connects patients with independent dermatologists who provide care through their private practices. Compounded prescriptions can be ordered via Miiskin and are dispensed by Foothills pharmacy. Standard medications can be issued for any local pharmacy. Comparison Chart: Target Audience - Agency: Adults (typically 20s and older) focused on skin renewal, Curology: Teens and adults with acne-prone or sensitive skin, Miiskin: Adults seeking top-notch dermatology care. Medical providers - Agency: Nurse practitioners, physician assistants, and some dermatologists, Curology: Nurse practitioners, physician assistants, and some dermatologists, Miiskin: Board-certified dermatologists. Pricing - Agency: Monthly subscription $30-$60, Curology: Monthly subscription $20-$60, Miiskin: Consultation $30-$59. Treatment - Agency: Personalized skincare for anti-aging and dark spots, Curology: Personalized skincare for acne, anti-aging, dark spots, or hair loss, Miiskin: A wide variety of skin problems including acne, anti-aging, melasma, hair loss and many more. Type of service - Agency: Subscription-based model, Curology: Subscription-based model, Miiskin: On-demand (pay as you need). Prescription capability - Agency: Personalized topical treatments, Curology: Personalized topical treatments, Miiskin: Oral or topical medications (compounded or commercial). Consultation model - Agency: Asynchronous consultations, Curology: Asynchronous consultations, Miiskin: Asynchronous consultations. Platform availability - Agency: Web only, Curology: Web only, Miiskin: Web & mobile app. How to get an online prescription via Miiskin? Miiskin connects you with board-certified dermatologists, who may prescribe FDA-approved generics or personalized compounded medications. If you are interested in a customized formula, simply select Foothills as your pharmacy and place your medication order directly in the Miiskin platform. Foothills will send you a payment link, and once payment is completed, your medication will be shipped free via UPS 2-day delivery. Transparent pricing: A consultation is typically around $59, and medication refills are around $39. The price of most Foothills formulas via Miiskin is $48.99 with a few exceptions being priced at $58.99 and some hair growth formulas priced at $68.99. You will not be enrolled in an automatic subscription, you will only purchase medication when you need it. Disclaimer: Compounded medications are not reviewed by the FDA for safety or efficacy.
with: Agency is a subscription-based online skincare service that provides custom-compounded topical treatments prescribed by dermatology providers.
Curology is a subscription-based online service that provides custom skincare through personalized topical formulas reviewed by licensed providers.
Miiskin is an online dermatology network that connects patients with independent, board-certified dermatologists across all 50 U.S. states.
The key difference is that Miiskin connects you with independent board-certified dermatologists who evaluate your condition and prescribe what's medically appropriate.
Miiskin operates on a pay-per-consultation model, allowing users to receive expert advice and treatment plans without being enrolled in automatic subscriptions.
